steps.name: When se realiza una peticion GET al endpoint "/users/9999"

request ("{ method: 'GET', url: 'https://reqres.in/api/users/9999?project'... 9 more characters, headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'x-api-key': 'pro_bd484b85d495d3a47a9f42f2168b002656fe'... 12 more characters, 'X-Reqres-Env': 'dev' }, failOnStatusCode: false }")
Then el codigo de respuesta debe ser 404
